channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti on wall, 1st March
item.description:
Needs to be cleaned off

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Melon Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shop wall covered in graffiti tags, 1st March
item.description:
Please cover up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Utility units graffitied, 1st March
item.description:
Next to the burger king

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellenden Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Potholes causing structural damage, 1st March
item.description:
This is an urgent public safety issue requiring immediate investigation. There appears to be serious structural damage affecting nearby properties, believed to be caused or worsened by defects in the road surface (severe potholes / subsidence / heavy vehicle impact). The impact is significant: • Buildings are experiencing noticeable vibration and shaking when buses and heavy vehicles pass. • Internal fixtures and doors are rattling and structural movement is noticeable. • There is concern this may indicate progressive structural weakening or subsidence. This is not just a maintenance issue — it is now a potential structural and safety risk to residents and the public. The severity is such that: • Disturbances occur repeatedly, including during the night. • The problem appears to be worsening. • Multiple properties may be affected. Urgent structural inspection before more severe issues ensue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radbourne Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight outside 90 Alleyn Road broke for months, 1st March
item.description:
Streetlight outside 90 Alleyn Road has been out for months, causing residents to feel unsafe
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Alleyn Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large PotHoles / unsafe road, 1st March
item.description:
This is an urgent public safety issue requiring immediate investigation. There appears to be serious structural damage affecting nearby properties, believed to be caused or worsened by defects in the road surface (severe potholes / subsidence / heavy vehicle impact). The impact is significant: • Buildings are experiencing noticeable vibration and shaking when buses and heavy vehicles pass. • Internal fixtures and doors are rattling and structural movement is noticeable. • There is concern this may indicate progressive structural weakening or subsidence. This is not just a maintenance issue — it is now a potential structural and safety risk to residents and the public. The severity is such that: • Disturbances occur repeatedly, including during the night. • The problem appears to be worsening. • Multiple properties may be affected. Urgent structural inspection and highway requires before further damage is caused

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radbourne Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small drain cover missing, outside Tesco, 1st March
item.description:
Small drain cover missing, outside Tesco. Someone could easy sprain their ankle in this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 129, Finchley Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags, 1st March
item.description:
Multiple rubbish bags dumped on Paget Rise.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paget Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign needs straightening, 1st March
item.description:
Please can this sign be repaired. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Breakspears Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 1st March
item.description:
Hi, This vehicle has been parked here for 4 years and hasn’t moved an inch. The tires are burst and all that’s different is the dashboard which sometimes has weed on it and sometimes doesn’t. It is parked taking up 2 spaces and doesn’t move, apparently road tax is paid.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goldsworthy Gardens, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken debris and smashed vehicle, 1st March
item.description:
Hi, As attached this vehicle has been smashed up and the debris of plastic and glass are all over the floor on the road. It’s been “parked” there for many days and is a road hazard. This area is a hot bed of gangs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goldsworthy Gardens, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A potentially abandoned van, 1st March
item.description:
There’s a white van sat just past the bridge that hasn’t moved in months. There’s a sign in the van saying it’s being worked on; however, the passenger window is smashed. It looks abandoned. The reg plates are sitting on the dashboard of the van.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdowne Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red Path E9 5TJ, 1st March
item.description:
Paving slab trip hazard for partially sighted and needles.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edmeston Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole in middle of road, 1st March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avondale Road, Mottingham, Greater London

item.title: Red Path, 1st March

item.title: Been there for a couple of months not moved, 1st March
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham

item.title: Crashed car with false number plates dumped in Peters Close, 1st March
item.description:
The Toyota Prius has been involved in an accident. It seems to have fake number plates and has been dumped in Peters Close for months now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peters Close, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two streetlights out opposite Mile End station, 1st March
item.description:
The streetlights either side of the junction between Mile End Road and Aberavon Road are out (possibly connected to the Thames Water works).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mile End Road, Mile End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
